response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a Staff/Senior Software Engineer with over 15 years of experience spanning embedded systems, mobile, web, and AI-agent infrastructure — a profile that substantially exceeds the scope of a Junior/Mid-Level role. While technically capable of performing the required work, the seniority mismatch creates a near-certain misalignment on compensation expectations, growth trajectory, and day-to-day responsibility level. Beyond overqualification, the resume shows no explicit PostgreSQL experience (primary database exposure is MongoDB with generic SQL references) and NestJS is entirely absent; React is mentioned but not a clear focus at this experience level.
strengths: Strong, production-proven TypeScript and Node.js proficiency across multiple roles and domains
Genuine fullstack breadth including AWS CDK, Kubernetes, and recent AI/agentic tooling (MCP frameworks)
Demonstrated software craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and conference talks on clean architecture
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff-level engineer with 15+ years applying for an entry-level individual contributor position creates a retention and compensation risk
No explicit PostgreSQL experience; database work centers on MongoDB with only generic SQL mentions, which misses the preferred stack
NestJS is absent from the resume and React exposure appears secondary despite the role listing both as core requirements
